title: rubus × crenatus
intro: Rubus × crenatus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or crenate black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus allegheniensis. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, particularly ellagic acid, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × crenatus include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. In terms of herbal preparations, Rubus × crenatus can be consumed as a juice, tea, or supplement, and its fruit and leaves can also be used to make jams, jellies, and other culinary products.
